headline: Southern Company Boosts Quarterly Dividend by 2.7%
summary: By Elias Schisgall Southern Company is boosting its quarterly dividend by 2.7% to 76 cents a share, from 74 cents. The new payout, equal to $3.04 a year, represents a 3.2% annual yield based...

headline: Berkshire Hathaway’s Big Utility Business Could Be Worth Close to $100 Billion
summary: Berkshire Hathaway  Energy is one of the three most important divisions of Berkshire Hathaway along with its railroad and insurance operations and it could be worth close to $100 billion.  The company is one of the largest utilities in the country with franchises in the Pacific Northwest and Midwest, plus operations in the U.K. It’s a leading producer of wind power.  It also owns a group of valuable natural-gas pipelines and a top real estate brokerage business, HomeServices of America.
